name: Deep Dark Chocolate Fudge Cookies
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Semi-sweet chocolate, broken into 1/2 oz pieces
4 oz Unsweetened chocolate, broken into 1/2 oz pieces
1 1/2 cups Light brown sugar, tightly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift all dry ingredients together and set aside.
2. Melt chocolate in a double boiler.
3. Cream butter with light brown sugar until smooth.
4. Add eggs one at a time, then vanilla extract to the mixture.
5. Gradually add melted chocolate next.
6. Mix well and stir in the remaining dry ingredients.
7. Fold in chocolate chips.
8. Form cookies into balls and place on ungreased baking sheets.
9. Bake for 18-22 minutes in a preheated oven at 325°F (165°C).
